description: Style Note Celebrate Spring-Summer 12' in style with these floral print flip flops from lotto. This pair balances a vacay vibe and street cool, that you can wear with casual clothes and at home! Product Details White and grey thong style straps with branding appliqued on the straps Grey printed soft footbed with branding embossed on the heel Raised heel TPU outsole with grooves and branded lugs on the forefoot and a branded lug at the heel Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
